'''Suite 44-1''' was [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Dictio L'varren]] private suite in a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]].<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />

[[Galactic News Network]] reporter [[Kella Rand]] came to visit L'varren in Suite 44-1 in order to deliver evidence incriminating [[Kaleb Darme]] in the assassination of chief [[Councillor/Legends|councilor]] of the [[Indu Council]], [[Shek Barayel]]. While she never made it to the room herself, as she was captured and stunned by Darme, her [[Cam droid/Legends|hovercam]] that she told to go to the room did make it, along with the evidence it was carrying. Once the hovercam reached the room and L'varren's men viewed the recording, they left the room to capture the murderer and rescue Rand.<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />
